description.ru: Общие transport, auth, CSRF, device scope и error conventions.
description.en: Shared transport, authentication, CSRF, device scope and error conventions.

ru: HTTPS вне development; JSON для обычных REST payloads.
Browser mutations требуют HttpOnly session, matching Origin и X-Nexora-CSRF.
Trust mutations дополнительно требуют X-Nexora-Device-ID и active/verified scope.
Responses возвращают requestId; errors имеют stable code/message без internal details.
en: HTTPS outside development; JSON for ordinary REST payloads.
Browser mutations require an HttpOnly session, matching Origin and X-Nexora-CSRF.
Trust mutations additionally require X-Nexora-Device-ID and active/verified scope.
Responses return requestId; errors use stable code/message without internal details.

text.ru: Ниже portal CI извлекает method/path/source из текущих server/cloud route declarations. Документированные payloads всё равно проверяйте по runtime validation и tests.
text.en: Portal CI extracts method/path/source from current server/cloud route declarations. Still verify documented payloads against runtime validation and tests.

description.ru: Auth, sync, rooms, messages, moderation, integrations, Pulse и operations.
description.en: Auth, sync, rooms, messages, moderation, integrations, Pulse and operations.

ru: Apply room policy and runtime input schema.
Write audit/system event and publish only authorised realtime payloads.
en: Apply room policy and runtime input schema.
Write audit/system event and publish only authorised realtime payloads.

description.ru: Devices, challenges, KeyPackages, groups, commits, Welcome и encrypted attachments.
description.en: Devices, challenges, KeyPackages, groups, commits, Welcome and encrypted attachments.

blocks.value:
Cookie: nexora_session=<HttpOnly cookie>
X-Nexora-CSRF: <session csrf>
X-Nexora-Device-ID: <active device uuid>
X-Request-ID: <8-128 safe characters>

text.ru: Server также проверяет active/verified record, credential/signature/challenge и exact account/conversation/group scope.
text.en: The Server also verifies the active/verified record, credential/signature/challenge and exact account/conversation/group scope.

description.ru: Realtime domains, delivery scope и generated event inventory.
description.en: Realtime domains, delivery scope and generated event inventory.

ru: User/room subscriptions создаются только после authenticated bootstrap.
Room access changes немедленно удаляют stale socket subscriptions.
Secure events доставляются только active verified group devices.
Events имеют domain type и payload; reducers применяют sequence/idempotency rules.
Sensitive/private state не помещается в general broadcast payload.
en: User/room subscriptions are created only after authenticated bootstrap.
Room access changes immediately remove stale socket subscriptions.
Secure events are delivered only to active verified group devices.
Events have domain type and payload; reducers apply sequence/idempotency rules.
Sensitive/private state is never placed in a general broadcast payload.

text.ru: Generated inventory ниже показывает фактические on/once/emit names и source lines, найденные при Pages build.
text.en: The generated inventory below shows actual on/once/emit names and source lines found during the Pages build.

description.ru: Стабильные классы отказов для Client, integrations и operations.
description.en: Stable failure classes for Client, integrations and operations.

rows.ru: Resource отсутствует или скрыт access policy
rows.en: Resource absent or hidden by access policy

text.ru: UI различает auth, permission, resource, validation, conflict, ban, rate-limit, upload и temporary errors; unknown internal details не показываются пользователю.
text.en: The UI distinguishes authentication, permission, resource, validation, conflict, ban, rate-limit, upload and temporary errors; unknown internal details are not shown to users.
